regions.content:
• 1.本图为中空200CBX型减速器。 This picture shows the hollow 200CBX reducer.
  • 2.减速机速比:(106,122,156,206,245,281):1。 Reducer speed ratio:(106,122,156,206,245,281):1.
  • 3.润滑油脂:VIGO GREASE RE0或RE-00 (MOLYWHITE)。 Grease: VIGO GREASE RE0 or RE-00 (MOLYWHITE).
  • 4.额定输出扭矩: 1960N.m (输出转速: 15R/Min)。 Rated output torque: 1960N.m (Output speed: 15R / Min).
